args.query: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND (repo_data_description NOT ILIKE '%binary%') AND repo_data_description ILIKE '%copies%' ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND (repo_data_description NOT ILIKE '%binary%') AND repo_data_description ILIKE '%copies%' ;

args.query: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND (repo_data_description NOT ILIKE '%binary%') LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND (repo_data_description NOT ILIKE '%binary%') LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT sample_path, COUNT(*) AS n FROM contents GROUP BY sample_path ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT sample_path, COUNT(*) AS n FROM contents GROUP BY sample_path ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swift_n FROM contents;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swift_n FROM contents;

args.query: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description, CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(?:duplicated|copied|appearing|appears|seen|repeated) ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS copies FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%' AND copies IS NOT NULL ORDER BY copies DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description, CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(?:duplicated|copied|appearing|appears|seen|repeated) ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS copies FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' AND repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%' AND copies IS NOT NULL ORDER BY copies DESC LIMIT 20;
